scripts.deploy: pnpm run db:migrations:apply && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated.jsonc
scripts.db:migrations:apply: pnpm run wrangler:config && wrangler d1 migrations apply CFBLOG_DB --remote --config wrangler.generated.jsonc
scripts.db:migrations:list: pnpm run wrangler:config && wrangler d1 migrations list CFBLOG_DB --remote --config wrangler.generated.jsonc

CFBLOG_DB.description: Canonical D1 database for posts, categories, menus, media metadata, redirects, settings, revisions, and schema versions. Set CFBLOG_D1_DATABASE_NAME and CFBLOG_D1_DATABASE_ID for remote deploy (Workers Builds or shell).

CFBLOG_MEDIA.description: R2 bucket for uploaded images and attachments. Set CFBLOG_R2_BUCKET_NAME for remote deploy.

CFBLOG_CACHE.description: Optional low-risk cache namespace. Canonical content must stay in D1 and R2. Set CFBLOG_KV_NAMESPACE_ID to bind KV; omit it to deploy without KV.

SITE_URL.description: Deployed site origin for canonical URLs, feeds, sitemap output, and admin mutation checks. Override per deploy with Workers Builds env `CFBLOG_SITE_URL`, or edit `vars.SITE_URL` in `wrangler.jsonc` as a default.

ENVIRONMENT.description: Runtime environment label. Override per deploy with Workers Builds env `CFBLOG_ENVIRONMENT`, or edit `vars.ENVIRONMENT` in `wrangler.jsonc`.

CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN.description: Cloudflare Access team domain for admin authentication, for example `https://your-team.cloudflareaccess.com`.

CF_ACCESS_AUD.description: Cloudflare Access application audience tag for the admin Access application.
